title: Ancient tree which inspired Brambly Hedge cottage discovered in Epping Forest
description: The crab apple tree inspired Jill Barklem’s illustration of Crabapple Cottage in the beloved children’s series.

title: Guterres: Fossil Fuels Are Destroying Planet Earth
description: António Guterres, the Secretary-General of the United Nations, said that fossil fuels are destroying planet Earth and holding economies hostage. Guterres wrote on the X platform on Wednesday night, April 22, that renewable energy can provide true and lasting energy security, something he said fossil fuels are unable to deliver. title: Türkiye's Manisa: Ancient heart of Lydia, Ottoman heritage

title: Ancient Law Leaves Homeowners Facing Huge Bills for Stream Maintenance
description: Homeowners in Cambridgeshire are facing unexpected costs after being informed they are responsible for maintaining a stream near their properties, due to a centuries-old law regarding riparian responsibilities. The case highlights potential issues with property disclosure and council maintenance responsibilities.
